query:
SELECT guiaNumero, numeroLote, sequencialTransacao, pacienteNome, dataExecucao, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as valorTotal
FROM procedimentos 
WHERE guiaNumero = '65811869' 
GROUP BY guiaNumero, numeroLote, sequencialTransacao, pacienteNome, DATE(dataExecucao)
ORDER BY dataExecucao
LIMIT 20;
